data.content: Validated branch knots-2412-acceptance-field at commits 3615af16914b and 3d4181f1029e. Acceptance is now first-class in knot_hot, CLI create/update, events/rehydration/sync, and prompt rendering. Added acceptance-focused app and sync tests. make sanity passed on 2026-03-22, including fmt, clippy, 700 unit tests, integration tests, and 95.05% coverage.
